title: clerodendrum laevifolium
intro: Clerodendrum laevifolium, also known as the Philippine glory bower or the smooth-leafed glorybower, is a plant species within the Clerodendrum genus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum laevifolium include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever reduction and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, with extracts typically being administered in tea or capsule form.
